executives.name: James Murdoch
executives.background: James Murdoch has been a member of the Board since July 2017. He is the founder and CEO of Lupa Systems, an investment holding company, and former CEO of 21st Century Fox.

executives.name: John Thornton
executives.background: Executive Chairman, Barrick Gold Corporation; Former President, Goldman Sachs.

executives.name: Kelly Ayotte
executives.background: Former U.S. Senator for New Hampshire and former Attorney General of New Hampshire.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
